ddls:
CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_number" INTEGER /* Level number of the character */,
  "level_requirement" INTEGER /* Experience points required to reach the next level */,
  "hp_recovery_rate_bonus" TEXT /* Bonus percentage to HP recovery rate */,
  "hp_percentage_requirement" TEXT /* Percentage requirement for HP */,
  "strength_boost_bonus" TEXT /* Bonus percentage to strength */,
  "agility_boost_bonus" TEXT /* Bonus percentage to agility */,
  "intelligence_boost_bonus" TEXT /* Bonus percentage to intelligence */,
  "charisma_boost_bonus" TEXT /* Bonus percentage to charisma */,
  "attribute_point_gain" INTEGER /* Number of attribute points gained per level */,
  "skill_point_gain" INTEGER /* Number of skill points gained per level */,
  "specialization_requirements" TEXT /* JSON object to store specialization requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the player last logged in */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A short bio or description of the player */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the player's social media profiles */,
  "last_known_ip" TEXT /* The last known IP address of the player */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the player is banned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who created the character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "current_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "hit_points" INTEGER /* Hit points (HP) of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* The class of the character */,
  "race" TEXT /* The race of the character */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* The specialization of the character */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* JSON object to store the character's equipment */,
  "attribute_points" INTEGER /* Total attribute points allocated */,
  "skill_points" INTEGER /* Total skill points allocated */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation score with different factions */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the character is a premium character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the character has reached */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "hp_recovery_rate" REAL /* Current HP recovery rate bonus */,
  "hp_percentage" REAL /* Current HP percentage requirement */,
  "strength_boost" REAL /* Current strength boost bonus */,
  "agility_recovery_rate" REAL /* Current agility recovery rate bonus */,
  "intelligence_recovery_rate" REAL /* Current intelligence recovery rate bonus */,
  "charisma_recovery_rate" REAL /* Current charisma recovery rate bonus */,
  "attribute_points_spent" INTEGER /* Total attribute points spent */,
  "skill_points_spent" INTEGER /* Total skill points spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id", "character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "current_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "total_experience_points" INTEGER /* Total experience points of the character */,
  "hit_points" INTEGER /* Hit points (HP) of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the character */,
  "agility" INTEGER /* Agility of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence of the character */,
  "charisma" INTEGER /* Charisma of the character */,
  "attribute_points" INTEGER /* Total attribute points */,
  "skill_points" INTEGER /* Total skill points */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score with different factions */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date and time the achievement was achieved */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress towards the achievement */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the achievement is hidden */,
  "reward" TEXT /* JSON object to store the reward for the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
column_names: Experience points required to reach the next level
Bonus percentage to HP recovery rate
Number of attribute points gained per level
Number of skill points gained per level
JSON object to store specialization requirements
